title: Forest Night panorama
description: This turns you menu backdrop into a forest with a glowing mushroom.
body: This is a amazing still backdrop for the main menu. The forest with the glowing mushroom is a amazing sight. And let me give credit to [here](https://www.vecteezy.com/photo/48624625-bioluminescent-mushrooms-in-a-dark-forest-background-nature) for providing the image I used for this resourse pack. All this pack does is change the main menu panorama into the image featured in the gallery and link above, and does nothing else.
